CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: high-explosive charged
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: An explosive warhead with an additional charge-ion payload.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: incendiary prometheum
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: An incendiary payload which covers a large area in prometheum flames. The magnesium warhead explodes upon impact, launching molten slag and flaming liquid in all directions.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: bunker buster
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: A thermobaric payload designed to destroy fortifications and structures.
